description: Connect to the Chinook SQLite database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) in DBeaver using the connection name 'Chinook'. Generate a monthly financial KPI report from the invoices table, sorted by month ascending, including: Month (YYYY-MM), Revenue (sum of Total, rounded to 2 decimals), InvoiceCount, UniqueCustomers, NewCustomers (count of customers whose first-ever invoice was in that month), CumulativeRevenue (running total, rounded to 2 decimals), and MoMGrowthPct (Month-over-Month revenue growth %, rounded to 2 decimals, NULL for the first month). Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/monthly_kpi.csv and save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/monthly_kpi.sql.
